mapper.select: SELECT DATE_FORMAT(pay_date, '%Y-%m') AS sale_month, SUM(amount) AS total_revenue, COUNT(pay_no) AS order_count FROM payment WHERE pay_status = 'SUCCESS' GROUP BY sale_month ORDER BY sale_month;

SELECT REVIEW_NO, USER_ID, TITLE, CONTENT, APPROVAL_STATUS, REG_DATE, COUNT(*) OVER() AS REVIEW_WAIT, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS POST_DAY FROM REVIEW WHERE 1=1 AND APPROVAL_STATUS = "WAIT"
AND USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND approval_status = "WAIT"
AND approval_status = "APPROVED"
AND approval_status = "REJECTED"
ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
ORDER BY REG_DATE ASC
ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}

SELECT REPORT_NO, REPORTER_ID, TARGET_TYPE, CASE WHEN TARGET_TYPE = 'MEMBER' THEN TARGET_USER_ID ELSE CAST(TARGET_ID AS CHAR) END AS UNI_TARGET_ID, REPORT_TITLE, REPORT_CONTENT, ANSWER_STATUS, ACTION_STATUS, REG_DATE, COUNT(*) OVER() AS REPORT_WAIT, DATE_FORMAT(REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS REPORT_DAY FROM REPORT WHERE 1=1
AND target_type = #{targetType}
AND REPORTER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (TARGET_USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR TARGET_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND REPORT_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND REPORT_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( REPORTER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR REPORT_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR REPORT_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND action_status = 0
AND action_status = 1 AND answer_status = 0
AND action_status = 1 AND answer_status = 1
AND action_status = 2 AND answer_status = 0
ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
ORDER BY REG_DATE ASC
ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE 1=1
AND target_type = #{targetType}
AND REPORTER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (TARGET_USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR TARGET_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND REPORT_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND REPORT_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( REPORTER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR REPORT_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR REPORT_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND action_status = 0
AND action_status = 1 AND answer_status = 0
AND action_status = 1 AND answer_status = 1
AND action_status = 2 AND answer_status = 0
ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
ORDER BY REG_DATE ASC
ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM report WHERE 1=1
AND REPORTER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND REPORT_TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND REPORT_CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND approval_status = "WAIT"
AND approval_status = "APPROVED"
AND approval_status = "REJECTED"
ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
ORDER BY REG_DATE ASC
ORDER BY REG_DATE DESC
SELECT PASS_NO, PASS_NAME, PRICE, REVIEW_CNT, IS_ACTIVE, REG_DATE FROM PASS_PRODUCT WHERE IS_ACTIVE = 1
SELECT * FROM PAYMENT P INNER JOIN PAYMENT_PASS P2 ON P.PAY_NO = P2.PAY_NO WHERE PASS_NO = 1 AND PAY_STATUS = "SUCCESS" AND USER_ID = #{userId};
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment ( user_id, amount, pay_status, pay_date ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{amount}, 'SUCCESS', NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM inquiry WHERE 1=1 AND status = #{status} ORDER BY reg_date DESC

SELECT M.USER_ID AS userId, U.NAME AS name, U.NICKNAME AS nickName, U.EMAIL AS userEmail, M.STATUS AS status, M.TEL AS tel, M.REG_DATE AS regDate, M.ROLE AS role, M.LAST_LOGIN AS lastLogin, U.WEDDING_DATE AS weddingDate, U.GENDER AS gender, CASE WHEN M.ROLE = 'USER' THEN 'USER' WHEN M.ROLE IN ('PARTNER', 'NPARTNER') THEN 'COMPANY' END AS targetType, R.reportCount FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN USER_DETAIL U ON M.USER_ID = U.USER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TARGET_USER_ID, COUNT(*) AS reportCount FROM REPORT WHERE ACTION_STATUS = 1 GROUP BY TARGET_USER_ID ) R ON R.TARGET_USER_ID = M.USER_ID WHERE 1=1 AND M.ROLE = 'USER'
AND M.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( M.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND status = #{status}
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN USER_DETAIL U ON M.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE 1=1 AND M.ROLE = 'USER'
AND M.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( M.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR NICKNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND status = #{status}

SELECT M.USER_ID AS userId, U.NAME AS name, U.NICKNAME AS nickName, U.EMAIL AS userEmail, M.STATUS AS status, M.TEL AS tel, M.REG_DATE AS regDate, M.ROLE AS role, M.LAST_LOGIN AS lastLogin, U.WEDDING_DATE AS weddingDate, U.GENDER AS gender, CASE WHEN M.ROLE = 'USER' THEN 'USER' WHEN M.ROLE IN ('PARTNER', 'NPARTNER') THEN 'COMPANY' END AS targetType FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN USER_DETAIL U ON M.USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE M.USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT M.USER_ID AS userId, C.COM_NAME AS companyName, C.COM_EMAIL AS companyEmail, C.COM_TYPE AS comType, C.COM_TEL AS comTel, C.COM_ADDRESS AS comAddress, M.LAST_LOGIN AS lastLogin, M.STATUS AS status, C.STATUS AS companyStatus, M.REG_DATE AS regDate, C.CEO_NAME AS ceoName, C.BIZ_NO AS bizNo, M.ROLE AS role, C.registration_fee AS registrationFee, R.reportCount, CASE WHEN M.ROLE = 'USER' THEN 'USER' WHEN M.ROLE IN ('PARTNER', 'NPARTNER') THEN 'COMPANY' END AS targetType, R.reportCount FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN COMPANY C ON M.USER_ID = C.USER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT TARGET_USER_ID, COUNT(*) AS reportCount FROM REPORT WHERE ACTION_STATUS = 1 GROUP BY TARGET_USER_ID ) R ON R.TARGET_USER_ID = M.USER_ID WHERE M.ROLE IN ('PARTNER', 'NPARTNER')
AND M.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND C.COM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND C.CEO_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( M.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR C.COM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR C.CEO_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND M.STATUS = #{status}
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN COMPANY C ON M.USER_ID = C.USER_ID WHERE M.ROLE IN ('PARTNER', 'NPARTNER')
AND M.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND companyName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ceoName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND ( M.USER_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR companyName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ceoName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND M.status = #{status}

SELECT M.USER_ID AS userId, C.COM_NAME AS companyName, C.COM_EMAIL AS companyEmail, C.COM_TYPE AS comType, C.COM_TEL AS comTel, C.COM_ADDRESS AS comAddress, M.LAST_LOGIN AS lastLogin, M.STATUS AS status, M.REG_DATE AS regDate, C.CEO_NAME AS ceoName, C.BIZ_NO AS bizNo, M.ROLE AS role, C.registration_fee AS registrationFee, C.com_intro AS comIntro, CASE WHEN M.ROLE = 'USER' THEN 'USER' WHEN M.ROLE IN ('PARTNER', 'NPARTNER') THEN 'COMPANY' END AS targetType FROM MEMBER M LEFT JOIN COMPANY C ON M.USER_ID = C.USER_ID WHERE M.USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT p.post_no AS postNo, p.user_id AS userId, p.category, p.title, p.content, p.reg_date AS regDate, p.view_cnt AS viewCnt, p.like_cnt AS likeCnt, p.is_deleted AS isDeleted, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment c WHERE c.post_no = p.post_no AND c.is_deleted = 0 ) AS commentCnt FROM Community_Post p WHERE 1=1
AND (p.category = '정보공유' OR p.category = '정보')
AND p.category = #{category}
AND p.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY regDate DESC
ORDER BY regDate ASC
ORDER BY regDate DESC
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Community_Post p WHERE 1=1
AND (p.category = '정보공유' OR p.category = '정보')
AND p.category = #{category}
AND p.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
AND (p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
SELECT COUNT(*) AS report_count FROM REPORT WHERE TARGET_USER_ID = #{target_id} AND ACTION_STATUS = 1
SELECT report_content, reporter_id, reg_date FROM report WHERE target_user_id = #{target_id} AND action_status = 1 ORDER BY reg_date DESC

SELECT REPORT_NO, REPORTER_ID, TARGET_TYPE, CASE WHEN TARGET_TYPE = 'MEMBER' THEN TARGET_USER_ID ELSE CAST(TARGET_ID AS CHAR) END AS UNI_TARGET_ID, REPORT_TITLE, REPORT_CONTENT, ANSWER_STATUS, ACTION_STATUS, REG_DATE FROM REPORT WHERE REPORT_NO = #{reportNo}

SELECT target_id AS targetId, target_type AS targetType, action_type AS actionType, reason, admin_id AS adminId, reg_date AS banRegDate FROM ban_history WHERE target_id = #{target_id} AND target_type = #{target_type} ORDER BY reg_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ban_history ( target_id, target_type, action_type, reason, admin_id ) VALUES ( #{target_id}, #{target_type}, #{action_type}, #{reason}, #{admin_id} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE REPORT SET action_status = 1 WHERE report_no IN
#{no}
mapper.select: SELECT p.pay_no AS payNo, p.user_id AS userId, p.amount AS amount, p.pay_status AS payStatus, p.pay_date AS payDate, ppp.pass_name AS passName FROM payment p JOIN payment_pass pp ON p.pay_no = pp.pay_no JOIN pass_product ppp ON pp.pass_no = ppp.pass_no ORDER BY P.pay_no DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}

SELECT p.pay_no AS payNo, p.user_id AS userId, p.amount AS amount, p.pay_status AS payStatus, p.pay_date AS payDate, r.res_no AS resNo, r.refund AS refund, r.refund_date AS refundDate, pp.product_name AS productName FROM payment p JOIN payment_reservation r ON p.pay_no = r.pay_no JOIN reservation rr ON r.res_no = rr.res_no JOIN product pp ON rr.product_no = pp.product_no ORDER BY P.pay_no DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}

SELECT p.pay_no AS payNo, p.amount AS amount, p.pay_date AS payDate, c.com_name AS comName FROM payment p JOIN payment_resistration pr ON p.pay_no = pr.pay_no JOIN company c ON pr.company_no = c.company_no ORDER BY P.pay_no DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payment
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payment P JOIN payment_pass p2 ON P.pay_no = p2.pay_no
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payment P JOIN payment_reservation R ON P.pay_no = R.pay_no
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM payment P JOIN payment_resistration PR ON P.pay_no = PR.pay_no

SELECT p.product_no AS productNo, p.company_no AS companyNo, p.product_name AS productName, p.product_details AS productDetails, p.original_price AS originalPrice, p.is_active AS isActive, p.img_url AS imgUrl, p.pro_type AS proType, p.tag AS tag, p.deposit AS deposit, c.com_name AS comName FROM product p LEFT JOIN company c ON p.company_no = c.company_no ORDER BY product_no DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product

SELECT coupon_code AS couponCode, coupon_name AS couponName, discount_rate AS discountRate, issue_type AS issueType, max_issue_cnt AS maxIssueCnt FROM coupon ORDER BY coupon_code DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon

SELECT pass_no AS passNo, pass_name AS passName, price AS price, review_cnt AS reviewCnt, is_active AS isActive, reg_date AS regDate FROM pass_product ORDER BY pass_no DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pass_product
